title: American Bacon and Bean Stew
description: A hearty keto stew made with bacon, beans, and a variety of dense ingredients. Perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the bacon and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Remove the bacon from the pot and set aside.
Add the stew meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the beans and bacon back to the pot.
Add 2 cups of beef broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
